samples.concept_summary: A function that calls itself with a base case to terminate.
samples.source_text: A recursive function must have a base case; without it the recursion never stops and the call stack overflows.
samples.student_message: What happens if a recursive function has no base case?

samples.concept_summary: Big-O describes how runtime grows with input size.
samples.source_text: Quicksort is O(n log n) on average but O(n^2) in the worst case when the pivot is poorly chosen.
samples.student_message: Is quicksort always n log n?
